tasks.description: Define custom exception hierarchy for the platform.
tasks.spec_section: Define class OmniAgentError(Exception). Subclasses: AuthenticationError(OmniAgentError), TenantIsolationError(OmniAgentError), WorkflowExecutionError(OmniAgentError), InvalidSignatureError(OmniAgentError), IdempotencyConflictError(OmniAgentError).
Test that all custom exceptions inherit from OmniAgentError and can be raised and caught correctly.
Define class Settings(BaseSettings) with fields: DATABASE_URL: str, REDIS_URL: str, JWT_SECRET: str, WEBHOOK_SECRET: str, etc. Include validation for numeric boundaries like rate limits > 0.
Test the Settings class loading from environment variables and validation of numeric boundaries for rate limits.

tasks.description: SQLAlchemy database engine and session setup.
tasks.spec_section: Setup SQLAlchemy Base, create_engine, and sessionmaker. Include logic for handling database connection loss scenarios.
Test the database engine initialization and session creation logic.
Define class Tenant(Base) with id: str (UUID), name: str, organization_id: str, and webhook_secret: str. Ensure organization_id is indexed.
Test the Tenant model creation and field validation.

Define class Workflow(Base) with id, tenant_id, name, status. Define class WorkflowStep(Base) with id, workflow_id, task_type, retry_policy (JSON), and dependencies (JSON). Import from src.models.tenant import Tenant.
Test the Workflow and WorkflowStep model relationships and field constraints.

Implement create_access_token(data: dict, expires_delta: timedelta) and verify_jwt(token: str). Include RBAC check: check_permissions(user_role: str, required_role: str). Import from src.core.exceptions import AuthenticationError, TenantIsolationError.
Test the create_access_token function and the check_permissions method for admin, operator, and user roles.

Implement class WebhookVerifier with method verify_signature(payload: bytes, signature: str) -> bool. Raise InvalidSignatureError if mismatch. Import from src.core.exceptions import InvalidSignatureError.
Test the verify_signature method of WebhookVerifier with valid, invalid, and empty signatures.

Implement class OutboxService with method save_event(db: Session, event_type: str, payload: dict, tenant_id: str). Ensure it runs in the same transaction as business logic. Import from src.models.database import Base.
Test the save_event method of OutboxService to ensure events are persisted correctly.
Implement class DAGProcessor with method validate_dag(steps: List[WorkflowStep]) -> bool to detect cycles. Import from src.models.workflow import WorkflowStep.
Test the validate_dag method of DAGProcessor with cyclic and acyclic step dependencies.

Implement class WorkflowExecutor with method execute_step(step: WorkflowStep, context: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]. Include retry logic with exponential backoff and _trigger_compensation. Import from src.models.workflow import WorkflowStep, WorkflowStatus and src.core.exceptions import WorkflowExecutionError.
Test the full execution flow of WorkflowExecutor including retries and compensating actions.
Implement class WorkflowScheduler with method schedule_workflow(workflow_id: str). Use Redis for queueing. Import from src.models.workflow import Workflow.
Test the schedule_workflow method of WorkflowScheduler.
Implement FastAPI routes for /api/auth/login and /api/auth/token. Use src.core.security to validate credentials. Return JWT tokens.
Test the login and token endpoints in src/api/auth.py.

Implement POST /api/webhooks/ingest. Use src.services.webhook_verifier.WebhookVerifier for HMAC. Implement idempotency check using X-Idempotency-Key. Import from src.core.exceptions import InvalidSignatureError, IdempotencyConflictError.
Test the full webhook ingestion flow from request to database persistence and idempotency.

Implement CRUD endpoints for workflows: GET /api/workflows, POST /api/workflows, etc. Enforce tenant isolation by filtering all queries by organization_id from the JWT. Import from src.models.workflow import Workflow.
Test the workflow management endpoints and their interaction with the engine.
Initialize FastAPI app, include routers from src.api, setup OpenTelemetry middleware, and configure Prometheus metrics. Import from src.api.auth, src.api.webhooks, and src.api.workflows.
Test the complete system startup and a basic end-to-end flow from API request to workflow execution.
